caption: The video features a man sitting in a radio studio, engaging in what appears to be a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed on it, a white cap, and headphones. The man is seated at a desk with a microphone in front of him, suggesting he is either hosting or participating in the show. The background includes banners with the text "Unique Hustle" and stars, along with a screen displaying "Where Bosses Talk!" The setting is professional, with various studio equipment visible, including a monitor and a branded mug. The man seems focused and engaged, likely discussing topics related to business or entrepreneurship.
